content:
I spent a day with a camera strapped to my belt and asked a few people to snap photos of me along the way. let this represent the imagery in my average day, with a manlier-than-usual slumber party appended to the end. we talked until 3 that night.












The kid in most of the pictures with me is my host brother, the kid im holding near the end. in the red is my friend taniguchi, a body builder who insisted i put his biceps on the internet. he came over later that night as well.

title: 11月19日7:30-3:00, the following day
